# Artifact rationale

> Fill in the fields below to record why an artifact was judged good and what transferable pattern it demonstrates. This template matches `schema-registry/artifact-rationale.v1.json`.

---

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Artifact** | _name or short identifier_ |
| **Task type** | _e.g. system design, analysis, writing, tooling_ |

## Why this was judged good

_What quality signal does this artifact carry? What made it succeed?_

## Trade-offs considered

_What alternatives were rejected? What constraints shaped the design?_

## Review criteria

_How was this artifact evaluated? What standards did it meet?_

## Transferable pattern

_What reusable pattern does this artifact demonstrate, abstracted from the specific context?_

## Non-portable details removed

_What context-specific or sensitive details were stripped to make this rationale portable?_

---

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Candidate export class** | `full_governed` / `task_limited` / `tool_bootstrap` / `capability` / `internal_only` |
| **Notes** | _any additional context_ |
